response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The video contains streamer commentary and custom game voice clips (Japanese clips from Hololive member Tsunomaki Watame played by a custom villager), which were not present in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was noted to have no vocal music, so 100% manual transcription was performed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match the vocal starts and ends of the speaker and the game custom clips to prevent any cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Oh, we do have to make a trip to...
subtitles.english: Oh, we do have to make a trip to...

subtitles.original: Maybe we'll do all carrots for one.
subtitles.english: Maybe we'll do all carrots for one.

subtitles.original: Oh, it's just not grown yet.
subtitles.english: Oh, it's just not grown yet.

subtitles.original: Ooh, Haste... it's just a rare, though.
subtitles.english: Ooh, Haste... it's just a rare, though.

subtitles.original: Speed, conduit power, glowing. What does glowing do?
subtitles.english: Speed, conduit power, glowing. What does glowing do?

subtitles.original: It makes you glow, that's it? Haha.
subtitles.english: It makes you glow, that's it? Haha.

subtitles.original: I mean, this one also has glowing.
subtitles.english: I mean, this one also has glowing.

subtitles.original: Oh, I hear you, I hear you.
subtitles.english: Oh, I hear you, I hear you.

subtitles.original: Maybe I'll start selling the common ones.
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll start selling the common ones.

subtitles.original: Oh, another! Please lay eggs when I'm down there.
subtitles.english: Oh, another! Please lay eggs when I'm down there.

subtitles.original: Ooh, I feel I'm going a little crazy with all these chicken noises.
subtitles.english: Ooh, I feel I'm going a little crazy with all these chicken noises.

subtitles.original: Okay, I think we should go...
subtitles.english: Okay, I think we should go...

subtitles.original: I'll put this here. Sell the bees. Okay, okay.
subtitles.english: I'll put this here. Sell the bees. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: This wasn't the slow life I imagined.
subtitles.english: This wasn't the slow life I imagined.

subtitles.original: 100、200... ちょっと計算できない。300くらい。
